title: Event-Ready Glow: The Ultimate Pre-Event Aesthetic Treatment Timeline
excerpt: Summer is coming—and so are weddings, garden parties, beach escapes, and glamorous rooftop evenings. With events filling up your...
body_text:
Summer is coming—and so are weddings, garden parties, beach escapes, and glamorous rooftop evenings. With events filling up your calendar, now is the time to start your beauty countdown. At Carisma Aesthetics, we believe in planning ahead to ensure that your skin looks refreshed, lifted, and effortlessly radiant when it matters most.

Whether you’re the bride, a guest, or simply want to feel your most confident this season, here’s your step-by-step aesthetic timeline to look and feel flawless all summer long.

[Image: Botox]

6 Weeks Before: Foundation First
This is the perfect time to address deeper concerns and lay the groundwork for long-term glow.

Botox or Wrinkle-Relaxing Treatments
Botox takes about 7–14 days to show full results, and starting early allows for a natural look with enough time for any needed touch-ups before your event. Think soft expressions, smoothed lines, and a refreshed look without overdoing it.

Skin Boosters or Hydrating Injectables
For that dewy, plump look (without makeup!), skin boosters deeply hydrate and improve skin quality from the inside out. The result? Glowing skin with subtle radiance.


4 Weeks Before: Volume & Structure
Time to enhance shape and balance.
Lip Fillers – Including the Russian Lips Technique
Add soft volume, define your Cupid’s bow, or opt for a trendy Russian Lip shape. Four weeks allows for swelling to subside, so you can enjoy a polished, natural look in time for photos.

Cheek or Jawline Filler
Sculpted features instantly elevate your appearance and frame the face—perfect for summer snapshots and formal looks.


2–3 Weeks Before: Texture & Glow
This is where we refine the surface and boost your skin’s natural brilliance.
Microneedling or PRP Facial
These collagen-stimulating treatments smooth texture, reduce pores, and leave skin firmer and fresher—ideal for radiant makeup application.

Glow-Boosting Facials
Our signature facials are designed to detox, hydrate, and awaken tired skin. Whether you choose a gold-infused facial or a brightening treatment, your complexion will thank you.


1 Week Before: Final Touches
Now’s the time for subtle polish, relaxation, and confidence.
Laser Hair Removal Touch-Up
Smooth skin is a must for sleeveless outfits, swimsuits, and carefree confidence. Quick touch-ups can keep you silky and photo-ready.

Aesthetic Massage or Spa Fusion Treatment
Soothe pre-event jitters and boost lymphatic drainage with a gentle massage that blends relaxation and beauty. Your skin will glow—and your mind will be at ease.


A Few Days Before: Minimal, Meaningful Moments
Hydrate, sleep well, and enjoy the calm before your celebration. Apply a hydrating sheet mask, use gentle skincare, and avoid trying new products to prevent last-minute irritation.


Glow Smart, Not Last-Minute
Great skin doesn’t happen overnight—and the most natural aesthetic results come from timing and subtlety. Whether it’s smoothing lines, sculpting features, or reviving dull skin, starting your plan early means you’ll look radiant without looking “done.”

Let our experts at Carisma Aesthetics guide your personalized summer countdown, so you can step into every event with confidence and camera-ready glow.

Book your session today at Carisma Aesthetics, where timeless beauty meets modern precision. Whether it's Botox, skin boosters, or the perfect pre-event facial, we’re here to help you feel your best this summer season.

For a complete transformation, pair your treatment with a luxurious spa experience at Carisma Spa & Wellness. From calming massages to detoxifying hammam rituals, we help you relax, reset, and glow from the inside out.

Because beauty isn’t just about how you look—it’s about how you feel.
